who: HR payroll managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll files/month
offer: For HR payroll managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll files/month, manual timesheet entry causes late payroll processing. We convert timesheet entries into formatted payroll files instead of manual entry.
problem: Manual timesheet entry leads to errors and delays in payroll processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR payroll managers
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll processing challenges
DM outreach to HR payroll managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for payroll management tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for data entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
